name: Cross-cycle late reply is accepted after user confirmation
description: A user completes a check-in, stops the current cycle, then sends a late update. The system asks whether it relates to the recent record; replying YES saves the observation to the most recent cycle.

script.text: I forgot to mention I also had a cough last night

expectations.value: Is this about your recent asthma record
expectations.description: System asks user to confirm cross-cycle context

expectations.value: added that to your recent record
expectations.description: System confirms observation added to recent cycle
Late reply is stored as an observation on the recent cycle
